data.title: By betting against James Wynn, this trader made $17 million in under a week
data.description:
A crypto trader has quietly earned over $17 million by consistently betting against one of Hyperliquid’s most-watched figures, James Wynn, whose high-risk strategy backfired with nearly $100 million losses. On May 30, blockchain analysis platform Lookonchain reported that a trader using the wallet address 0x2258 has been tracking Wynn’s activity and executing reverse trades.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/insights/by-betting-against-james-wynn-this-trader-made-17-million-in-under-a-week/

data.title: Whale's Ethereum Trade Results in Significant Loss
data.description:
According to Odaily, a blockchain analyst named Yu Jin has reported a significant loss incurred by a whale due to a trading strategy involving Ethereum (ETH). The whale initially sold 50,754 ETH at $1,754 per unit on April 23, converting them into 89.03 million USDT. This transaction included 15,000 ETH borrowed for short selling.

After 27 days, the whale repurchased 34,343 ETH using the 89.03 million USDT at a price of $2,592 per ETH. This resulted in a reduction of their ETH holdings from 35,754 to 19,302 ETH, marking a loss of 16,452 ETH.

In terms of value, the whale experienced a financial loss of $42.64 million. The current value of their 19,302 ETH is approximately $50.04 million, whereas the original 35,754 ETH would be valued at $92.69 million today.

data.title: A whale turned 35,754 ETH into 19,302 ETH due to a low-sell high-buy, losing $42.64 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, a whale "turned" 35,754 ETH into 19,302 ETH due to a low-sell and high-buy, losing $42.64 million.
On April 23, he sold 50,754 ETH at $1,754 for 89.03 million USDT, of which 15,000 ETH were shorted with borrowed coins.
Then, 27 days later, he bought back the 89.03 million USDT at $2,592 for 34,343 ETH.
In terms of the number of ETH, he lost 16,452 ETH: the 35,754 ETH he originally held turned into 19,302 ETH.
In terms of value, he lost $42.64 million: the 19,302 ETH he now holds are worth $50.04 million, while the 35,754 ETH are currently worth $92.69 million.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs See $9 Billion Inflows Amid Escalating Shift Away From Gold
data.description:
Recent trends in the Bitcoin ETFs market reveal a significant shift in investor sentiment, with funds flowing into BTC exchange-traded funds while gold-backed funds experience notable outflows. Bitcoin ETFs Emerge As Preferred Safe Haven According to a Bloomberg report, US Bitcoin ETFs have attracted over $9 billion in inflows in the past five weeks, primarily driven by BlackRock Inc. ’s iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (IBIT). In contrast, gold-backed funds have seen outflows exceeding $2
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-etfs-see-9-billion-inflows-amid-escalating-shift-away-from-gold/

data.description:

Currently, over $240 billion worth of stablecoins are in circulation. Stripe aims to promote their everyday use, competing with similar initiatives from PayPal and Visa, and has already launched products to accelerate crypto adoption in. . .

data.title: New Wallet Withdraws Significant Ethereum Amount from CEX
data.description: According to TechFlow, a newly created wallet recently withdrew 4,150 ETH, valued at approximately $10.72 million, from a centralized exchange (CEX). This transaction was detected by the on-chain analysis platform Lookonchain about 50 minutes prior to the report.

data.title: Matador Signs Letter of Intent to Invest $3.2 Million in Technology Company HODL Systems
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Canadian technology company Matador Technologies Inc. has signed a binding letter of intent to invest up to $3.2 million in Indian technology company HODL Systems. It is reported that HODL Systems has announced the implementation of a financial strategy including investment in digital assets. After the completion of this investment transaction, Matador will hold a 24.95% stake in the company and will also expand into the Indian market, including the distribution of its proprietary digital gold products and other Ordinals technologies. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Brazilian Firm Meliuz Seeks to Raise $26.45 Million for Bitcoin Purchase
data.description: According to PANews, Brazilian publicly traded company Meliuz has filed an application to raise $26.45 million. The funds are intended for the acquisition of Bitcoin, as reported by Bitcoin Magazine.

data.title: Stablecoin Payments Projected to Reach $850 Billion by 2030
data.description: According to PANews, recent data from OKG Research reveals that stablecoin payments have reached an annual settlement volume of $50.8 billion as of 2024. This figure represents 7.3% of the global personal cross-border remittance market, which is approximately $696 billion. The report highlights that stablecoin payments have maintained an annual growth rate exceeding 60% for two consecutive years. The advantages of low fees, real-time settlement, and round-the-clock availability are gradually positioning blockchain-based payments as a viable alternative to traditional cross-border remittance channels. OKG Research anticipates that if the current growth rate persists, the scale of stablecoin cross-border settlements could surpass $850 billion by 2030.
